categories.name: مَا وُصِفَ بِالْحَقِّ
categories.nameEn: Things Called the Truth in the Quran

items.verse: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْحَقُّ وَأَنَّهُۥ يُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَأَنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌۭ
items.verseEn: That is because Allāh is the True Reality and because He gives life to the dead and because He is over all things competent

items.verse: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
items.verseEn: That is the True [i.e., certain] Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return.

items.verse: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّۭ ۖ فَلَا تَغُرَّنَّكُمُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَا يَغُرَّنَّكُم بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْغَرُورُ
items.verseEn: O mankind, indeed the promise of Allāh is truth, so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about Allāh by the Deceiver [i.e., Satan].

items.verse: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ رَسُولَهُۥ بِٱلْهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ ٱلْحَقِّ لِيُظْهِرَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِۦ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ٱلْمُشْرِكُونَ
items.verseEn: It is He who has sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion, although they who associate others with Allāh dislike it.

categories.name: أنواع الرّياح في القرآن
categories.nameEn: Types of Winds in the Quran

items.verse: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ إِذْ جَآءَتْكُمْ جُنُودٌۭ فَأَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًۭا وَجُنُودًۭا لَّمْ تَرَوْهَا ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا
items.verseEn: O you who have believed, remember the favor of Allāh upon you when armies came to [attack] you and We sent upon them a wind and armies [of angels] you did not see. And ever is Allāh, of what you do, Seeing.

items.verse: فَأَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًۭا صَرْصَرًۭا فِىٓ أَيَّامٍۢ نَّحِسَاتٍۢ لِّنُذِيقَهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْخِزْىِ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ أَخْزَىٰ ۖ وَهُمْ لَا يُنصَرُونَ
items.verseEn: So We sent upon them a screaming wind during days of misfortune to make them taste the punishment of disgrace in the worldly life; but the punishment of the Hereafter is more disgracing, and they will not be helped.

items.verse: وَأَرْسَلْنَا ٱلرِّيَـٰحَ لَوَٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ فَأَسْقَيْنَـٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمْ لَهُۥ بِخَـٰزِنِينَ
items.verseEn: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers.

items.verse: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
items.verseEn: And in ʿAad [was a sign], when We sent against them the barren wind.

categories.name: أَصْنَافُ النَّاسِ فِي سُورَةِ الْوَاقِعَةِ
categories.nameEn: Categories of People in Surah Al-Waqi'ah

items.verseEn: Then the companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?
And the companions of the left - what are companions of the left?
Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,

items.verse: ٱسْتَحْوَذَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ ذِكْرَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ
items.verseEn: Satan has overcome them and made them forget the remembrance of Allāh. Those are the party of Satan. Unquestionably, the party of Satan - they will be the losers.

items.verse: وَإِن كَانَ طَآئِفَةٌۭ مِّنكُمْ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱلَّذِىٓ أُرْسِلْتُ بِهِۦ وَطَآئِفَةٌۭ لَّمْ يُؤْمِنُوا۟ فَٱصْبِرُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يَحْكُمَ ٱللَّهُ بَيْنَنَا ۚ وَهُوَ خَيْرُ ٱلْحَـٰكِمِينَ
items.verseEn: And if there should be a group among you who has believed in that with which I have been sent and a group that has not believed, then be patient until Allāh judges between us. And He is the best of judges."

items.verse: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ مِن كُلِّ أُمَّةٍۢ فَوْجًۭا مِّمَّن يُكَذِّبُ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
items.verseEn: And [warn of] the Day when We will gather from every nation a company of those who deny Our signs, and they will be [driven] in rows

items.verse: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَرَّقُوا۟ دِينَهُمْ وَكَانُوا۟ شِيَعًۭا لَّسْتَ مِنْهُمْ فِى شَىْءٍ ۚ إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُمْ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ يُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
items.verseEn: Indeed, those who have divided their religion and become sects - you, [O Muḥammad], are not [associated] with them in anything. Their affair is only [left] to Allāh; then He will inform them about what they used to do.

harf.hint: A massive star whose light brightens our daytime sky
harf.arabicVerse: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
harf.verse: 27:24 - I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allāh, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided,

deduction.title: The Elder's Unexpected Nourishment
deduction.intro: In the sacred precincts of the House of Allah, an elderly servant of God experienced a profound mystery that defied all expectation. This devoted individual, long past the years of natural parenthood, witnessed something extraordinary that revealed the boundless mercy of the Divine. The puzzle lies in uncovering this forgotten moment from the lives of the prophets.
clues: My people were known as Israel, descendants of a great patriarch of old.
I spent my nights in prayer, prostrating before my Lord in the temple.
I was granted a son in my old age, a gift I never ceased to glorify Allah for.
My trial involved discovering a sustenance that appeared for a young soul under my care.
I was a prophet named Zakariyya, tasked with caring for Maryam in the Bayt al-Maqdis.
The answer lies in the verse where Allah accepted Maryam and provided sustenance for her.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: The prophet who cared for Maryam in the temple
The prophet who built the sacred house
The prophet swallowed by a great fish
The prophet who fled from his people
The prophet who spoke to Allah directly
identity.answer: The prophet who cared for Maryam in the temple

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Being tested with years of drought
Finding sustenance mysteriously provided for a young ward
Preaching to a nation that rejected divine guidance
Being thrown into a pit by one's own people
Receiving revelation through visions
trial.answer: Finding sustenance mysteriously provided for a young ward

location.label: Key Element
options: A ship built from planks and nails
The sacred temple of Jerusalem
A garden that was destroyed
A city built by a righteous king
The depths of the ocean

outcome.label: Outcome
options: The people believed and followed the messenger
Divine acceptance and mercy for those devoted to worship
The punishment came upon the disbelievers
A son was born in old age as promised
Safe passage through the wilderness
outcome.answer: Divine acceptance and mercy for those devoted to worship

deduction.arabic: فَتَقَبَّلَهَا رَبُّهَا بِقَبُولٍ حَسَنٍۢ وَأَنۢبَتَهَا نَبَاتًا حَسَنًۭا وَكَفَّلَهَا زَكَرِيَّا ۖ كُلَّمَا دَخَلَ عَلَيْهَا زَكَرِيَّا ٱلْمِحْرَابَ وَجَدَ عِندَهَا رِزْقًۭا ۖ قَالَ يَـٰمَرْيَمُ أَنَّىٰ لَكِ هَـٰذَا ۖ قَالَتْ هُوَ مِنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَرْزُقُ مَن يَشَآءُ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
deduction.verse: So her Lord accepted her with good acceptance and caused her to grow in a good manner and put her in the care of Zechariah. Every time Zechariah entered upon her in the prayer chamber, he found with her provision. He said, "O Mary, from where is this [coming] to you?" She said, "It is from Allāh. Indeed, Allāh provides for whom He wills without account." (3:37)

translations: And among His Signs (is the) creation
surely (are) Signs for those of knowledge
scramble.hint: A verse reflecting on the signs of Allah in the diversity of creation, including the heavens, earth, languages, and colors.
scramble.arabic: وَمِنْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦ خَلْقُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱخْتِلَـٰفُ أَلْسِنَتِكُمْ وَأَلْوَٰنِكُمْ ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍۢ لِّلْعَـٰلِمِينَ
scramble.verseEn: And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth and the diversity of your languages and your colors. Indeed in that are signs for those of knowledge.
